description: OriginalVoices provides audience insights from "Digital Twins" of real people so users can ask questions and get structured human-perspective responses. It is positioned for AI assistants, agents, and developer workflows that need research or validation input from modeled real audiences.
summary: OriginalVoices exposes a bearer-authenticated REST API at https://api.originalvoices.ai, a hosted Streamable HTTP MCP server at https://api.originalvoices.ai/mcp that supports API key or OAuth, and an npm-distributed `ov` CLI.
